partial_progress.details: Iteration 4 complete. Key finding: 'W ~ M' case is mathematically consistent (not a contradiction). Proved gamma-based facts (G(gamma) not in V/W'/W''/M). Termination requires well-founded recursion - impossibility approach does not work. 13 sorries remain. Next: implement Nat.strongRecOn termination or derive M non-reflexive.

completion_data.completion_summary: Iteration 4: Deep analysis of 13 sorry locations. Proved W'' ~ M case is mathematically consistent. Established gamma-based derivations (G(gamma) not in any witness). Requires well-founded termination approach for resolution.
